title: Rhamnoneuron balansae
taxonomy: Rhamnoneuron balansae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, specifically within the genus Rhamnoneuron. It belongs to the order Rosales and is further classified as a member of the clade Eurosids I. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and molecular analysis. Rhamnoneuron balansae is a shrub or small tree that is native to the Himalayan region. The classification of this plant is subject to ongoing research and may be revised as new evidence emerges.
